The '''K-wing''' was a model of [[starfighter]] in use. The [[hull]] of the fighter craft consisted of two large horizontal wings attached to the main hull, with a smaller diagonal wing on the each underside. It was propelled by three [[sublight engine]]s, one per wing and a third fixed atop the rear of the starfighter's hull. The front of the fighter consisted of two [[cockpit]]s, and the fighter was armed with a large ventral [[turret]] armed with two dual [[cannon]]s, and a smaller dorsal turret. The fighter could also carry [[bomb]]s and ordinances under each wing.<ref name="SWU" />
